title: Boatswain's Mate
description: Supervises deck operations and small boat handling for search and rescue, law enforcement, and maritime safety missions.

title: Machinery Technician
description: Operates and maintains diesel engines, electrical systems, and machinery aboard Coast Guard cutters and boats.

title: Electronics Technician
description: Installs, maintains, and repairs advanced electronics including communications, radar, and navigation systems.

title: Information Systems Technician
description: Manages Coast Guard computer networks, cybersecurity systems, and communications infrastructure.

title: Operations Specialist
description: Coordinates search and rescue, monitors vessel traffic, and operates radar and communication systems at command centers.

title: Yeoman
description: Manages administrative functions including correspondence, records management, and personnel documentation.

title: Storekeeper
description: Manages supply chain logistics including procurement, inventory control, and financial record keeping.

title: Health Services Technician
description: Provides emergency medical care, preventive medicine, and clinical health services at Coast Guard units.

title: Maritime Enforcement Specialist
description: Conducts maritime law enforcement, port security, and anti-terrorism operations to protect U.S. waters.

title: Marine Science Technician
description: Conducts environmental protection inspections, pollution response, and waterways management operations.

title: Aviation Electronics Technician
description: Maintains and repairs avionics, electrical systems, and electronic components on Coast Guard aircraft.

title: Aviation Maintenance Technician
description: Performs maintenance on aircraft airframes, engines, rotor systems, and mechanical components.

title: Aviation Survival Technician
description: Serves as rescue swimmer performing open-water rescues from helicopters in extreme conditions.

title: Intelligence Specialist
description: Collects, analyzes, and disseminates intelligence to support Coast Guard law enforcement and homeland security missions.

title: Damage Controlman
description: Performs firefighting, damage control, and hull repairs to maintain safety and integrity of Coast Guard vessels.
